title: Generative AI Engineer Co-op at Exact Sciences
content: Nishanth has been a Generative AI Engineer Co-op at Exact Sciences in Madison, Wisconsin since January 2026. His work includes retrieval benchmarking, reranker evaluation, embedding model benchmarking, enterprise RAG evaluation design, synthetic knowledge base generation, and LLM evaluation for hallucination and PII risk.

title: Graduate Teaching Assistant at Northeastern University
content: He worked as a Graduate Teaching Assistant at the College of Engineering, Northeastern University from January 2025 to April 2025. He instructed students in Python, statistical modeling, clustering, NLP, and time-series forecasting while supporting labs, coding assessments, and project reviews.

title: Data Analyst Intern at SWEDEnterprises
content: At SWEDEnterprises from January 2024 to June 2024, Nishanth built SQL and Python SCD frameworks on ERP and scrap data, created Tableau dashboards, automated validation and cleansing, built forecasting pipelines, and supported supply-chain analysis that improved accuracy, reduced waste, and lowered operational costs.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Analyst Intern at Skill Vertex
content: At Skill Vertex from March 2022 to April 2022, he provisioned AWS infrastructure, implemented monitoring and alerting, optimized cloud costs, automated backup and recovery workflows, and applied IAM and SSL controls for secure operations.
